Class IuHttpClientEvent

java.lang.Object
iu.client.IuHttpClientEvent
All Implemented Interfaces:
edu.iu.IuObservableEvent
public class IuHttpClientEvent extends Object implements edu.iu.IuObservableEvent
Observable HTTP client event.
